news.title: Trump Fed pick Kevin Warsh clears key Senate hurdle, teeing up final vote
news.summary: Current Fed Chair Jerome Powell has faced a barrage of criticism from Trump over his refusal to slash interest rates as much as the president wants.

news.title: Bill Ackman's $5 billion Pershing Square IPO to start trading, testing Berkshire-style vision
news.summary: The listing gives public investors their first direct stake in Ackman's investment platform. The firm runs a concentrated portfolio of 10 large-cap names.

news.title: OpenAI’s subtle drift from Microsoft has become an aggressive move toward Amazon
news.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft remain partners, but the AI company has been rapidly pushing into Amazon's world. OpenAI is a subsidiary of Amazon's cloud computing division.

news.title: Uber makes big bets on travel, hotels and AI voice bookings at annual product showcase
news.summary: Uber is launching new segments as it attempts to position itself as an all-in-one consumer platform. Uber is launching a new set of segments to compete with Google, Facebook and others.

news.title: Oil prices extend multi-day rally as Trump issues new threat to Iran; Brent tops $114 per barrel
news.summary: The latest move higher comes amid reports that the U.S. will look to extend its blockade of Iranian ports. The latest move comes as Iran's stock market continues to rise.

news.title: Iran war is fueling a bond selloff ahead of Fed Chair Jerome Powell’s final press conference
news.summary: The oil shock and elevated inflation are top worries for investors in the bond market. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell prepares to deliver the final press conference of his career at the central bank's helm.

news.title: ‘I am her scapegoat’: My mother-in-law squandered all her money. Do we buy her a house so she’s not homeless?
news.summary: “She blames me for her poor relationship with her son and grandchildren,” he says. “She’s very angry with me.”

news.title: Construction on new homes jumps to a 15-month high, but the real-estate slump isn’t over
news.summary: Home builders ramped up construction in March as the weather warmed. Housing starts hit a 15-month high, but an industry slump appears no closer to ending.

news.title: Government waste, fraud and abuse rose 13% last year — despite Musk and DOGE saying they’d cut $1 trillion from the budget
news.summary: Cutting it all still won’t save the budget, says the president of the U.S. Chamber of Commerce. “It’s just not worth it,” he says, “to cut it all.”

news.title: Why this Soros alum is betting on copper and cables over AI chips
news.summary: Renaud Saleur is looking past politics to bank on megatrends like electrification, natural resources and AI bricks and mortars.
